sentences.english: I'm a coffee person all the way.
I need at least two cups before I can even talk to anyone.
sentences.korean: 최소 두 잔은 마셔야 누구와도 대화할 수 있어요.

sentences.english: It's more relaxing and it doesn't make me jittery like coffee does.
sentences.korean: 더 편안하고 커피처럼 초조하게 만들지 않아요.

sentences.english: I drink both depending on my mood.
In the morning I want coffee for energy, but in the evening I like herbal tea.
sentences.korean: 아침에는 에너지를 위해 커피를 마시고 저녁에는 허브차를 좋아해요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
